$description: Cooud UI design tokens in the W3C DTCG format, grouped cooud.{theme}.{mode}.{token}. GENERATED by packages/tokens/scripts/build-tokens.ts from src/tokens.ts — do not edit by hand. Color $values are the source-of-truth CSS color strings (mostly oklch(), some with a ' / <alpha>' channel), kept verbatim rather than converted so nothing is lost; use figma-variables.json (or convert downstream) if a tool needs sRGB hex. Gradients are not tokens — the bg-gradient-* utilities derive from primary/accent at runtime.
